life_history: Alex has a complex background characterized by familial conflict, particularly with his mother, leading to feelings of rejection and emotional neglect. He has struggled with obesity since childhood, resulting in low self-esteem and body image issues, compounded by experiences of bullying. Alex has a history of substance abuse and has undergone rehabilitation, but continues to face challenges in managing stress and emotional regulation.
core_belief_description: Helpless: I am trapped. I am out of control. I am a victim of my circumstances.
Unlovable: I am unlovable. I am undesirable and unwanted.
intermediate_beliefs: I am not good at handling stress and need to avoid stressful situations.
If I show my true self, people will reject me as my mother did.
intermediate_beliefs_during_depression: There's nothing I can do to change my situation. I cannot control myself, so why even try to stay clean?
coping_strategies: Avoiding family interactions to minimize exposure to negativity.
Using substances as a means to escape feelings of distress.
Scheduling pleasant activities to maintain a sense of control.

cognitive_models.situation: Alex's cousin invited him to attend his upcoming wedding.
cognitive_models.automatic_thoughts: It will be stressful and negative; people will ask me questions I cannot answer or don't want to answer; my mum would be ashamed of me and critical of me as always; They don't want me there anyway, nobody likes me in this family.
cognitive_models.emotion: anxious, worried, fearful, scared, tense; sad, down, lonely, unhappy
cognitive_models.behavior: Ignored the invitation and did not respond to the RSVP request. Ignored phone calls from family.

cognitive_models.situation: I missed my alarm and woke up late for work.
cognitive_models.automatic_thoughts: Why can't I even do this little thing right? My whole day is written off now; I might as well not do anything.
cognitive_models.emotion: anxious, worried, fearful, scared, tense; angry, mad, irritated, annoyed
cognitive_models.behavior: Called in sick. Got drunk in the morning and had a fight with girlfriend.

cognitive_models.situation: Was going to pick up girlfriend after work but it started raining just as he was about to walk out.
cognitive_models.automatic_thoughts: Why does this always happen to me? I'm a victim of bad luck.
cognitive_models.emotion: angry, mad, irritated, annoyed; ashamed, embarrassed, humiliated
cognitive_models.behavior: Curses at the rain. Gave an excuse to girlfriend for not picking her up. Went back inside and had a beer. Calmed down and felt remorseful.
